use_cases: Users updating their account information including name, email, and profile picture
Profile settings forms in user dashboards
Account management interfaces for membership sites
Onboarding flows where users complete their profile
Settings pages for SaaS applications requiring user data entry
ai_summary: A profile editing form component that allows users to update their personal information including name, email, and profile picture. Features a clean, minimalist design with an image upload area, text inputs for user details, and action buttons for saving changes or canceling. Designed for account settings and user profile management interfaces across various platforms.
